headline: Man's LinkedIn 'Open To Work' Banner Has Been Up For 14 Months, He's 'Being Selective'
summary: Selective means 'waiting for a job that doesn't require mornings, effort, or pants.'
fullBody: Jake Selective's LinkedIn has said 'Open to Work' for 14 months. 'I'm being picky,' Jake said. His mother asked 'how picky?' Jake responded: 'no early mornings, no hard work, remote only, and pants optional.' His mother suggested 'maybe adjusting expectations.' Jake declined. He has applied to 0 jobs. 'Nothing fits my vibe,' he said. His savings account is 'also selective' — about leaving.
